title: Sinocarum dolichopodum
taxonomy: Sinocarum dolichopodum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Sinocarum, which is a group of plants native to Asia. The plant is further classified into the family Apiaceae, which includes other plants like carrots and parsley. Within the family Apiaceae, Sinocarum dolichopodum is classified into the order Apiales, which includes other plants with similar characteristics. This classification helps scientists understand the relationships between different plant species.
